raw.problem: Last-mile freight in cities still runs on diesel autos.
raw.why_now: City EV mandates + charging density crossed a threshold.
raw.success_scenario: If diesel bans expand, switch is forced.

structured.tagline: Zero-emission last-mile freight replaces diesel in cities.
structured.problem: Last-mile freight in cities still runs on diesel autos.
structured.opportunity_size: Last-mile logistics ~$5B; electrification ~$1.5B; basis not specified by founder.
structured.differentiator: Lease+charge EV fleet model backed by Auto-MBAs and EV ops veterans.
structured.solution: Electric last-mile freight fleet with lease+charge model, 60 deployed.
structured.ask: Funding to scale deployed EV last-mile freight fleet.

badges.label: self-reported claims
badges.detail: Business claims are self-reported and not independently verified

disclaimer: Only mechanically checkable public signals were assessed; all non-mechanical claims are self-reported and not independently verified.
